channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Greenland rejects Trump's hospital ship proposal citing existing free healthcare system
item.description: Greenland's prime minister rejects Trump's hospital ship offer, saying the territory has free healthcare unlike America where "it costs money to go to...

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after ‘unauthorized entry’ into Mar-a-Lago: Secret Service
item.description: A man was fatally shot after allegedly making an "unauthorized entry" at Mar-a-Lago while carrying what appeared to be a shotgun and fuel can.

item.title: Bernie Sanders Was Asked About Growth — and His Socialism Fell Apart
Yikes: Interpretive Anti-ICE Dance About Pretti, Good Killings Hits Maximum Cringe
Jalisco Cartel Chaos: Government Now Urging Puerto Vallarta Tourists to Lock Down
Update: Armed Mar-a-Lago Intruder Now Identified
Hot Takes: Great Patriotic Message As US Wins Gold, Inspires Memes Dunking on Canada
AOC blames critics, Trump after Munich hiccup backlash
item.description: AOC faces viral criticism after stumbling over Taiwan defense question, with fiancé's snoring heard during her lengthy Instagram response to critics.

item.title: Why keeping lawmakers in DC during shutdown may have caused more harm than good
item.description: Congress left Washington without resolving DHS funding crisis because no deal was close, avoiding potential mayhem from keeping lawmakers idle during ...

item.title: President Trump tells Netflix to fire Susan Rice or 'pay consequences'
item.description: Trump demands Netflix fire board member Susan Rice or "pay the consequences" after she warned corporations not to expect Democratic forgiveness for th...
